title: Noterophila rosulans

intro:
I couldn't find any information on "Noterophila rosulans." It's possible that this plant species may not exist, be misidentified, or be a misspelling.

However, based on a search, I found that Notopleura rosulans, a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, may be what you are looking for.

Here's a paragraph about this plant:

Notopleura rosulans is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. Studies have found that extracts of Notopleura rosulans have potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The bioactive constituents of Notopleura rosulans include alkaloids and flavonoids, which may contribute to its medicinal properties. Notopleura rosulans is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and it is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to support various health conditions.
